The '''Pimbrellan League''' was a coalition of three planets that was located in the [[Kathol Outback/Legends|Kathol Outback]] at the end of the [[Sebiris Run]]. The League was settled decades before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] by devotees to [[Pinacism]]. The planets of the League were [[Dolstan]], [[Swedlan]], and [[Bresan]]. Each world established self-sufficient nation-states, and a small industrial base for the production of [[Comlink/Legends|comlinks]], satellites, hover vehicles and [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Education was an important part of Pimbrellan society, and the Pinacist leaders were highly educated.

The League maintained a small navy of [[Corvette/Legends|corvettes]] to protect their member worlds from [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and [[Slaver/Legends|slavers]]. Unlike many of the Outback's denizens, the League kept track of events in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] using agents on [[Gandle Ott]]. Since they were Pinacists, they believed it was their destiny to sit out the grand events of history, then emerge to pick up the pieces. Gathering intelligence gave them clues as to when this should be. As the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] fell, debate grew as to whether or not this was "The Event" that would see them return to the galaxy and fulfill their destiny.
